title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Hymn to Inanna for Ishme-Dagan
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Hymn to Inanna for Ishme-Dagan.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Hymn to Inanna for Ishme-Dagan.

translation.text: From 'Hymn to Inanna for Ishme-Dagan': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
